content: Backend: add dpp_data to ClosetItem + CreateItemIn schemas
Backend: dpp_parser.py service — inline JSON, URL fetch, JSON-LD (incl @graph), SSRF guards, image download, material+colour normalisation
Backend: POST /api/v1/closet/{id}/photo (add/replace with The Eyes single-item + CLIP re-embed)
Frontend: 'Scan DPP' tile in AddItem flow + secondary toolbar
Frontend: 'Scan QR' global CTA in TopNav
Frontend: DPP panel + Add photo/Replace photo button on ItemDetail
Frontend: DPP-only placeholder on Closet card (QR icon + 'DPP' caps-label)
i18n: full English copy for dpp.scanner/panel/nav/photo + errors
E2E test: inline JSON DPP → import → save → add photo → auto-segment; SSRF guards; malformed JSON handling — all passing
